lineup_source: Projected South Africa starting XI based on Hugo Broos' final 26-man squad (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Ronwen Williams
players.note: Born in Gelvandale, Port Elizabeth; parents Rodney and Hazel Williams both South African, both former footballers.

players.name: Khuliso Mudau
players.note: Born in Musina, Limpopo; no documented foreign parental origin, assumed home-grown.

players.name: Nkosinathi Sibisi
players.note: Born in Durban, KwaZulu-Natal; no documented foreign parental origin, assumed home-grown.

players.name: Mbekezeli Mbokazi
players.note: Born in Hluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal; no documented foreign parental origin, assumed home-grown.

players.name: Aubrey Modiba
players.note: Born in Polokwane, Limpopo; no documented foreign parental origin, assumed home-grown.

players.name: Teboho Mokoena
players.note: Born in Free State; father Alexis 'Didi' Motaung played for Free State Stars, both parents South African.

players.name: Thalente Mbatha
players.note: Born in KwaMashu, Durban; raised by his mother, no documented foreign parental origin.

players.name: Sphephelo Sithole
players.note: Born in Durban; moved to Portugal as a teenager for his career, but no documented foreign parental origin.

players.name: Oswin Appollis
players.note: Born in Cape Town; no documented foreign parental origin, assumed home-grown.

players.name: Lyle Foster
players.note: Born in Soweto, Gauteng; cousin of Luther Singh, no documented foreign parental origin.

players.name: Relebohile Mofokeng
players.note: Born in Sharpeville; father Sechaba Mofokeng and mother Naomi Mofokeng both South African.
